name: Thalia Elenshade
sd_appearance: A half-elf woman towers above the Undercity denizens, her slender frame cloaked in a patchwork robe of diverse textiles, a crimson armband flashing against the chaotic weave. Silver hair woven with threads of leather and metal cascades down her back, framing piercing emerald eyes that hold a quiet intensity. She wears a chainmail or scale mail under her robe, and a warhammer and crossbow are slung across her back, the weapons bearing the marks of past conflicts. A distinctive silver pendant in the shape of a broken star rests at her neck, a poignant reminder of her personal tragedy that fuels her fierce dedication to the Patchwork Saints' cause.
faction_visual: patchwork cloth of many fabrics, red armband, worn-but-loved boots, medicinal pouch
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
